title: Pocket Roses
description: Just a tiny mod that adds old Pocket Edition roses back into the game
body:
As it says in the summary this is a tiny mod that adds Pocket Edition roses without replacing any other flowers. This mod doesn't add anything else just a cyan rose.

![The Multicolor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/96e0672ffa3d4a1589c8ed8f5b639cec61874a42.png)
